reason: Both answers hit the key points: drop AI-powered as differentiator, narrow to resource forecasting as a category-of-one, shift buyer to ops/margin owner, demote PM to supporting proof, anchor pricing to margin. Answer A adds a risk section (customer confusion during transition, smaller funnel tradeoff, and importantly a caution to validate via win/loss interviews before betting the brand) which adds useful rigor without padding. Answer B is equally clear and adds a good land-and-expand tactic, but lacks that risk/validation framing. Slight edge to A for completeness and prudence.
